# thoth_billing_invoices (Data Source)

Reads recent billing invoices and totals for the tenant.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of invoices to return.

### Read-Only

- `invoices_json` (String) Invoice rows as JSON array.
- `response_json` (String) Full billing invoices response payload as JSON.
- `total` (Number) Total invoices returned.
- `totals_json` (String) Invoice aggregate totals object as JSON.
